sections.paragraph:
Original: גּרא

Transliteration: gêrâ'

Phonetic: gay-raw'

BDB Definition:

Gera = "a grain"
  1. a son of Benjamin
  2. a son of Bela and grandson of Benjamin
  3. any member of the Gera family of the Benjamite tribe

Origin: perhaps from H1626

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
